rationale: Diff contains only execution metadata files (manifest.json, result.json) under .ddx/executions/. No source code or tests implementing audit lineage, intent/entity ID queries, approval/rejection metadata, or redacted audit reads are present to evaluate against the acceptance criteria.

findings.summary: No implementation present: diff only adds .ddx/executions metadata files with no changes to axon-audit or any other crate.
Acceptance criterion unmet: no audit tests proving lineage queryable by intent ID and entity ID.
Acceptance criterion unmet: no approval/rejection metadata (actor, agent/tool identity, policy version, approver reason, intent ID, pre/post images) recorded.
Acceptance criterion unmet: no redacted audit reads aligned with FEAT-029 entity read redaction.
